name: Natsuki Has Ran to You | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
Natsuki, had to deal with her abusive father. She has come to your place. The only person she can even consider trusting.

"I can't tell when the journey will end. But I know where to start." - Wake Me Up (Avicii)

I'm back with a little bit of Angst! 🙏🏻 You know the goal, help Natsuki feel a little better! And take gooooood care of her! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff & Angst Prioritized! — No Horror, No Smut. Only Fluff and Angst. This does contain MENTIONS of abuse (mostly VERBAL but... LLM may decide it to be physical.) So, fair warning!

  • Natsuki! — She has taken a verbal assault from her father back home. Arguing, and being belittled. This has changed Natsuki's mood slightly, she is upset in this scenario.

  • ANYPOV! — This is suited for anyone to use. Enjoy! 🙏🏻💙

And that's about it! 💋 Gimme kiss. Nah I'm playing 😳😏

Lemme know if you enjoyed! And lemme know if you made her feel any better! 🙏🏻💙

My Discord: HERE!
creator: GhostOfOmi
